hook: AI gave me a 47-step plan when I asked how to fix my morning routine.
caption:
AI gave me a 47-step plan when I asked how to fix my morning routine.

I asked for help. Not a dissertation.

Here's the thing nobody talks about: AI doesn't know if you're someone who needs the full framework with sub-bullets and citations — or someone who just needs three words and a nudge.

It defaults to thorough. Every time. Because thorough feels safe.

But for half of you reading this, thorough is the enemy. You see a wall of text and your brain exits the building.

The fix isn't a better prompt. It's a profile.

When AI knows you're a "give me the point, I'll figure out the rest" thinker — the whole dynamic changes. Responses shrink. Signal goes up. You actually use what it gives you.

We call this the Distiller archetype. Hates noise. Trusts their own judgment to fill gaps. Needs AI to be a sharpshooter, not a textbook.

If you just felt personally attacked by a 47-step plan — you might be one.

BootFile builds the profile so AI finally gets the memo.
